title: General
description: Procurement status table for cross-project lab purchases
summary: General hardware procurement live list: active cross-project purchase status plus a small received archive. ClawCross WeChat procurement pass updated Cymple as ordered but presale shipping on 2026-07-12, Unitree SV1-25 as ordered by Zheng Yuhang on 2026-07-04, and RealMan bimanual arms as a Romoya-route follow-up. Received archive still includes the VIVE Tracker chest/thigh strap, PICO 5-point body tracker, HIG data glove, and HIGVR haptic clothing module.

intro_table.caption: General procurement live list + received archive · ClawCross WeChat pass 2026-07-05

rows.item: Tracker quick-release / headset top fixed base
rows.notes: For Tracker / PICO4 / Quest 3 headset mounting in human-centric VR data collection. User reported shipped on 2026-06-16.

rows.item: Head-mounted first-person phone holder / 头戴手机支架
rows.notes: User-provided Taobao candidate marked 假一赔四. Use as a first-person hands-free operation / repair-view ego-video capture mount; before purchase confirm headband stability, phone clamp size/weight, anti-drop tether, FOV, comfort, and safe static or low-risk use. Do not treat active road-driving filming as an experiment requirement.

VRChat-style face and eye capture candidate for human-centric data collection. Selected purchase option from screenshot: headset/category Quest3S, SKU 面捕眼追套装（包含HUB）, page price RMB 900. ClawCross WeChat evidence from 2026-06-23 LV-Robotic Lab 创世工作群: the item was bought, had not shipped yet, the store was presale, expected ship date was 2026-07-12, and destination was Singapore. Verify Quest3S fit, face-capture plus eye-tracking support, HUB inclusion, PC/VRChat data path, and whether the stream can be exported for human-intention / teleop experiments.

rows.item: Unitree SV1-25 mini stereo global-shutter USB camera / 宇树 SV1-25 具身立体双目相机
rows.notes: User-provided Taobao candidate marked 假一赔四: Unitree SV1-25 small / mini embodied stereo binocular camera, RGB global-shutter USB camera. ClawCross WeChat evidence from Zheng Yuhang private chat: Boris asked Zheng to place the Taobao order on 2026-07-04, and Zheng replied that the camera would be ordered that day. Next verify tracking, arrival, SDK/driver availability, resolution/FPS, stereo calibration support, ROS/ROS2 or Python access, USB bandwidth, mount compatibility, cable length, and whether it fits wrist/head/fixed-view robot data collection.

rows.item: RealMan bimanual arm pair / 睿尔曼双臂
rows.route: Romoya purchase path · Zheng Yuhang / Clement
rows.notes: ClawCross WeChat evidence: 2026-07-03 Boris asked about ordering a pair of 睿尔曼 arms; 2026-07-04 Zheng chat records that Prof. Yan wants the purchase routed through Romoya, and Zheng will raise it with Clement while temporary-office logistics are pending. Next confirm exact model, pair quantity, payload, vertical mounting feasibility, DaiMeng gripper adapter, quote, delivery destination, and acceptance owner.

rows.item: Back-to-school Mac replacement / 开学 Mac 换机配置
rows.notes: Preferred configuration to choose at school-start replacement time: 14-inch MacBook Pro, M5 Max, 128GB unified memory, 2TB storage. Treat this as a configuration target, not an availability or purchase confirmation.
Marked done by user on 2026-06-12. Lab previously bought four; current request was six 2m cables.

rows.item: Toy knife for slime-clay cutting / 儿童仿真切菜刀玩具
rows.notes: For 01 toy-knife slime-clay cutting: blunt-edge toy knife only. Keep Stage 0/1 limited to toy knife, washable surface, low speed, and cleanable fixture.

rows.item: M&G ultra-light clay / 晨光超轻粘土
rows.notes: For 01 toy-knife slime-clay cutting: slime-clay cutting material; verify cleanability, deformation visibility, and whether it sticks to the toy knife or fixture.

rows.item: Jenga tower blocks / Jenga叠叠高积木
rows.notes: For 02 Jenga extraction: tower or custom block stack; still needs target-block marking material, non-slip base / anti-slip mat, owner assignment, and gripper/tactile readiness confirmation before run.

rows.item: Grey leather desktop mat / 灰色皮革办公桌垫
rows.notes: Reusable tabletop protection / visibility mat for slime-clay cutting and plastic-bag rubbing; confirm washable surface, camera contrast, and whether it slips under robot contact.

For 04 Lego tool operation: Lego brick separator plus safe plastic small tools such as small hammer-style and plier-style tools. Existing candidate link is still useful, but first-round procurement should prioritize safe tool size and compatibility with large bricks.

rows.item: Large-particle building blocks / 大颗粒拼装积木
rows.notes: For 04 Lego tool operation: first round should use large-particle bricks before moving to small-particle or random bulk pieces. Compare Singapore shipping and total price; purchase still needs human confirmation.

rows.item: Large Rubik-style cube / 大号魔方
rows.notes: For the two 90-degree cube-turn long-horizon failure-data demo. Buy a large, low-resistance Rubik-style cube or oversized cube that is easier for Wuji fingers to contact and visually track; verify size, torque, safety, sticker/color contrast, and whether it tolerates repeated low-speed robot turns before using it as the canonical cube-turn prop.

rows.route: Taobao / supplier · VIVE Tracker + MANUS charging
rows.notes: User request: buy two one-to-three charging/data cables with all three outputs as Type-C / USB-C; about 1m length should be enough. Intended for VIVE Tracker and MANUS charging; confirm charge-only vs data capability before checkout. User-provided Taobao share code: CA381.

Archived as arrived per Boris update on 2026-07-05. Chest / thigh strap is now available for VIVE Tracker calibration, replay, and fit checks; keep as received hardware rather than an open procurement item.

rows.item: PICO body-tracker kit / PICO 5-point full-body tracker
rows.notes: Archived as arrived per Boris update on 2026-07-05. Selected option remains 全身体感追踪器【官方原装5点追踪】, platform-after-subsidy RMB 1109; use for no-base-station body-tracking tests against VIVE Tracker-style setups.
Archived as arrived per Boris update on 2026-07-05. Large-space VR / dexterous-hand capture candidate; original logistics note said shipped on 2026-06-16.
Archived as arrived per Boris update on 2026-07-05. Touch / vibration feedback accessory for VR capture experiments; original logistics note said shipped on 2026-06-16.
